query: SELECT name, COUNT(*) as count, GROUP_CONCAT(id) as ids FROM categories GROUP BY name HAVING count > 1;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4Q7Ff1dQzmRy3yJ.root --database PSoWNi4qKtkxQMNVjLyPzh --execute SELECT name, COUNT(*) as count, GROUP_CONCAT(id) as ids FROM categories GROUP BY name HAVING count > 1;
